inline_comments.message:
1. why is the initialization of the array list is without size? you know i'ts gonna be size 4
2. why you are using arrayList with complexity of O(n) if all you need from that collection is to check contains(x). you can use Set which is O(1). please replace
why do you need this? the simplePropertyTypes is static initialized
why you are not using ListMultiMap? you've got this comment is your last review by Oren
do not return null from public function. use Optional so the user will have an idea that a null is a valid return value from this function
this could be merged and be simplified. see intellij comment
could be used inline in the next line. no need to introduce a new variable if you are not going to use it
this could be extracted to a function that return new portTemplateConsolidationData and use the retun value inline on the next line
this number of arguments are not acceptable. minimize them or use an object
why do you need a java doc for private method?
refactor this function. it is not readable. extract to functions
don't introduce if you're using once. use inline
see my comment in class ConsolidationEntityType

you are filtering a list( complexity O(n) ) and using it only in one place to check if a value in contained in that list (another iteration over the list with complexity of O(n) ). why not make this function get a parameter of the value you want to check and iterate it once?
you can decrease complexity if you check for null and return Optional.empty() and do the rest of the function if not
move to the right scope (inside if and close to it's use
reduce complexity by checking not present
could this be simplified? it looks like all this ifs are to get a value to check in the last if
this is got out of hand. extract all input parameters to an object and use command design pattern instead of this switch

The method is being called from various places so need help regarding extracting an object/reducing parameters. eg. the call from FunctionTranslationGetAttrImpl, every parameter is coming from a hierarchy of methods so unable to find a common source for them. Also please refer to my other comments for extraction.

Can you please suggest a name for this object ? Could not think of one because they seem to be generic entities used across the translation. Also what are the number of acceptable parameters for a method? Current sonar setting is set to 8.
Can you please suggest a name for this and why do we need it. These are 5 independent generic parameters which were still under the sonar limit of 8.
Extracting this would require lot of information to be passed to the new method as parameters which would again cause a violation.
Need help with refactoring this. Cannot extract function as number of parameters to pass to the new function will be more than acceptable.
Need help with this. can this be done as a separate chekin ?
Need help with this. can this be done as a separate chekin ?
you should have left this function as is and the only thing is to change the the list to set and in ConsolidationDataUtil to to get and check for null (instead of contains)
Replaced with Set and used contains.
this list is not going to change. why not making it public, static, and unmodifiableSet and then just to get it instead of regenerate it every time (think performance)
